news.summary: Mercury Insurance, based in Los Angeles, was recently acknowledged for its outstanding workplace culture, flexibility, and support for working families. The company has earned a spot on Newsweek's prestigious 2025 lists of America's Greatest Workplaces for Parents & Families and America's Greatest Workplaces. This recognition highlights Mercury Insurance's commitment to providing a conducive work environment and strong support system for its employees. The company's dedication to fostering a family-friendly workplace has led to this significant achievement in being recognized among top workplaces in the country.
news.headline: Mercury Insurance recognized for workplace culture, flexibility, and support for families by Newsweek in 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on July 3, 2025, an inventor from Altoona, Florida shared his thoughts on creating a better system for dust removal in work areas. The inventor, a tile installer, introduced THE DUST DOME as a unique solution to traditional dust barriers. This innovative design aims to enhance dust control measures with improved efficiency.
news.headline: Inventor from Florida creates Dust Dome system for better dust management in work areas.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, the University of Houston Law Center made an announcement via PRNewswire regarding the appointment of Joshua Lake as the new director of its Criminal Justice Clinic and professor of practice. Joshua Lake assumed his role on July 1, 2025, and he is recognized for his extensive background in criminal justice and legal defense spanning over ten years.
news.headline: Joshua Lake appointed as director of UH Law's Criminal Justice Clinic. More than a decade of experience. Effective July 1, 2025.

news.summary: A recent report has revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in the last decade. This decrease represents approximately 500,000 people finding employment. Additionally, the report shows that the economy has grown by 3.2% in the last quarter, outperforming predictions by 0.5%. This growth is attributed to increased consumer spending and a surge in manufacturing output. Overall, these figures indicate a positive trend in the country's economy, with more people finding jobs and contributing to economic growth.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, Mesa Laboratories, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.16 per share for its common stock (NASDAQ: MLAB). Shareholders of record on August 29, 2025, will receive the dividend on September 15, 2025. This announcement was made by the Company's Board of Directors.
news.headline: Mesa Labs declares quarterly dividend of $0.16 per share, payable on Sept. 15, 2025, to shareholders of record on Aug. 29.

news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, announced on July 3, 2025, that the results of its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ® ) revealed the average rate for a 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) at 6.67%.
news.headline: Freddie Mac's Primary Mortgage Market Survey shows the 30-year FRM averaging 6.67%, a decrease as of July 3, 2025.

news.summary: AstraZeneca Plc (NASDAQ: AZN) is reportedly in negotiations with Summit Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: SMMT) for a potential partnership valued at up to $15 billion. This deal would grant AstraZeneca the rights to ivonescimab, a lung cancer drug. Sources familiar with the matter revealed that the discussions are currently private. Summit has also been engaging with other major pharmaceutical firms regarding the same drug. In a recent development, Summit's highly-anticipated lung cancer study involving ivonescimab did not meet its overall survival goal. For further details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: AstraZeneca in talks for $15B drug deal with Summit Therapeutics for lung cancer treatment drug Ivonescimab.

news.summary: Spanish Mountain Gold has released a new Preliminary Economic Assessment for its Spanish Mountain Gold Project in British Columbia. The base case NPV5% after-tax is C$1.0 billion, with an IRR of 18.2% and a 3.4-year payback period at a gold price of US$2,450 per ounce. At the current spot gold price of US$3,300 per ounce, the NPV5% increases to C$2.3 billion, with a 32.0% IRR and a 2.0-year payback period. The Company's updated Mineral Resource Estimate is included in the announcement. Spanish Mountain Gold Ltd. trades on the TSX-V under the symbol SPA, FSE under S3Y, and on the OTCQB exchange.
news.headline: Spanish Mountain Gold's PEA shows base case NPV5% of C$1B, 18.2% IRR, and 3.4-year payback at US$2,450/oz. At US$3,300/oz, NPV5% C$2.3B, 32.0% IRR, and 2.0-year payback.

news.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. (NYSE: FDP) is an autonomous publicly traded company based in Coral Gables, Florida. It has no financial or operational ties to Del Monte Foods Inc., a separate entity embroiled in legal and bankruptcy issues. The two firms are distinct entities with no common ownership, management, or activities. Del Monte Foods Inc. is privately held in the U.S. and is under the ownership of a Singapore-based parent company. This emphasizes the complete independence between Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. and Del Monte Foods Inc.
news.headline: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc. states it's not linked to Del Monte Foods Inc., a separate entity in litigation. #NYSE #FDP

news.summary: London, UK, July 03, 2025 - SWL Miner has introduced a new range of cloud mining contracts to democratize access to crypto mining. This initiative aims to simplify the process of earning daily returns for both newcomers and seasoned investors, eliminating the need for hardware, maintenance, or technical expertise. Established in 2017 with a registered capital of £1 million and operating under a verified license, SWL Miner is emerging as a leading provider of straightforward, secure, and scalable crypto income solutions. Recent platform enhancements enable users to receive passive returns in Bitcoin, Litecoin, and other cryptocurrencies directly to their wallets on a daily basis. SWL Miner's innovative approach has garnered global attention by overcoming traditional barriers that deterred investors from participating in crypto mining.
news.headline: "SWL Miner launches cloud mining contracts for easy crypto income, with £1 million capital, offering passive returns in Bitcoin, Litecoin, and more."

news.summary: SARATOGA, Calif. - On July 3, 2025, CapsoVision, Inc. (NASDAQ: CV), a company focusing on developing cutting-edge imaging and artificial intelligence technologies for capsule endoscopy solutions, successfully completed its initial public offering. The offering involved 5,500,000 shares of common stock priced at $5.00 per share. These shares started trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market as of July 2, 2025, under the ticker symbol “CV.”
news.headline: CapsoVision closes IPO offering of 5.5 million shares at $5.00 each, trading on Nasdaq under "CV" as of July 2, 2025.
